caption: The video shows a person preparing a dish, likely rice krispie treats, in a large metal mixing bowl. The individual is using a spoon to mix and press down on the mixture of marshmallows and cereal, ensuring it is well combined. As they work, they occasionally use their hands to gather and shape the mixture, indicating a hands-on approach to the preparation. In the background, there is a plate with some finished treats and a red bowl containing additional cereal or ingredients. The setting appears to be outdoors, as suggested by the bright sunlight and blue sky visible in the top left corner of the frame. The video seems to be part of an educational series from the UCAR Center for Science Education, possibly demonstrating a cooking or science-related activity.
